case_title: ADRIANNA BROGGI ET AL VS. LYFT, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-22-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
